name: hrm-coraza
description: Sistema de Gestion Humana - Coraza Seguridad CTA

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install && npm install --prefix backend --include=dev && npm install --prefix frontend && cd backend && npx prisma generate && cd .. && npm run build --prefix frontend
